theses.thesis: US labor market stays resilient through July 2026

questions.q: Will the US lose jobs in July 2026?
Will the US unemployment rate for July 2026 be above 4.3%?
Will the Fed cut rates at its September 2026 meeting?

theses.note: Topical snapshot during the July 2026 Hormuz disruption. Constituent markets resolve mid-July 2026; after that the gate will report stale/insufficient evidence, which is correct behavior.
theses.thesis: Energy supply risk is rising (oil shock)

questions.q: Will Strait of Hormuz traffic return to normal by July 15, 2026?
Will Iran's average daily crude oil production for June 2026 be at least 2.0 million barrels per day?
Will WTI crude oil settle above $80 per barrel on July 31, 2026?
